chapter_title.ar: باب الْكَسِيرِ وَ الْمَجْدُورِ وَ مَنْ بِهِ الْجِرَاحَاتُ وَ تُصِيبُهُمُ الْجَنَابَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – The one with a broken (limb), and the one with pockmarks, and the one with the injuries, and they are hit by the sexual impurity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/186)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/186)
text: قَالَ يَتَيَمَّمُ الْمَجْدُورُ وَ الْكَسِيرُ بِالتُّرَابِ إِذَا أَصَابَتْهُ الْجَنَابَةُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The one with pockmarks and with the broken limb would perform Tayammum with the dust when the sexual impurity hits him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘One with smallpox or broken bones has permission to take Tayammum with soil after experiencing sexual relation.”’
